summary: Comprehensive testing of Paw Paradise service provider dashboard completed. All 12 backend API endpoints tested with 100% success rate. Frontend login, dashboard, appointments, and navigation tested successfully with proper UI components and user flows working.
passed_tests: ✅ Auth Register API (POST /api/auth/register)
✅ Auth Login API with demo credentials (POST /api/auth/login)
✅ Auth Me API with Bearer token (GET /api/auth/me)
✅ Provider Onboarding API (POST /api/provider/onboarding)
✅ Provider Profile API (GET /api/provider/profile)
✅ Provider Services API (GET /api/provider/services)
✅ Provider Bookings API (GET /api/provider/bookings)
✅ Booking Status Update API (PUT /api/provider/bookings/{id}/status)
✅ Booking Requests List API (GET /api/provider/booking-requests)
✅ Booking Request Accept API (PUT /api/provider/booking-requests/{id}/action)
✅ Dashboard Stats API (GET /api/provider/dashboard/stats)
✅ Dashboard Today Schedule API (GET /api/provider/dashboard/today)
✅ Login page loads with demo credentials auto-fill functionality
✅ Demo credentials button works and fills login form correctly
✅ Login process completes and redirects to dashboard
✅ Dashboard page loads with 4 metric cards (revenue, bookings, rating, requests)
✅ Dashboard displays today's schedule card and pending requests card
✅ Navigation to Appointments page works correctly
✅ Appointments page tabs (Calendar/List views) working
✅ Calendar grid displays 35 calendar days correctly
✅ Appointments list view shows bookings table with proper data
✅ Sidebar navigation between dashboard and appointments functional
✅ All UI elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
✅ Responsive design elements working on desktop viewport

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (core functionality working, minor session timeout on direct URL access)
